$comment: c155 D-LK10-CRT-INIT-INVOKE closure witness #3: setlocale — the anchor's cited locale case — works on EVERY runnable leg with the trampoline calling main directly (no user-side CRT-init sequence): libc's loader-run init leaves the startup locale "C" queryable (pe: msvcrt DllMain; elf: ld.so runs libc.so.6's initializers; macho: dyld runs libSystem's before LC_MAIN). Category 0 = msvcrt LC_ALL / glibc LC_CTYPE — both valid, both echo "C" at startup (see main.c). stdout asserted byte-for-byte; msvcrt text mode makes it CRLF.
